title: Euphonic Sessions with Kyau & Albert - June 2022 Edition
description:
01 Tourist - Your Love [Monday Records] [TRACK OF THE MONTH]
02 Nora En Pure - Us (Passenger 10 Afro Tension Remix) [Sirup Music]
03 Kyau & Albert - Another Time (Luccio Remix) [Euphonic]
04 Boss Axis & Daniela Weidlich - One Last Time [Euphonic Visions]
05 Vintage & Morelli x Arielle Maren - Valley Of Hope (Dave Graham Remix) [Monstercat Silk]
06 Alex Byrka & Van Yorge - Waiting for Tomorrow [Emergent Shores]
07 Tim Iron - Outburst [Elliptical Sun Melodies]
08 John Grand - Ellipsis [Euphonic]
09 Bajau ft Zoe Kypri - I Am You [Stress]
10 Andain - Promises (Myon  Summer Of Love Reboot) [Black Hole]
11 Kay Wilder - Operator [High Contrast]
12 Armin van Buuren & AVIRA vs Chicane - Offshore [Armind]
13 Above & Beyond - Can't Sleep (Ruben de Ronde & Elevven Remix) [Anjunabeats]
14 Grue - Empty Silence [Melancholy Records]
15 Signalrunners - Meet Me In Montauk (Judah Remix) [Anjunabeats]
16 Anden - Youth Is Wasted On The Young (Martin Roth Remix) [Odd One Out]
17 BOYOCA - Change (Bacavi Remix) [EMK]
18 OLAN  - Wake And Return [Anjunadeep]
19 Terry Da Libra - Your Eyes [Monstercat Silk]
20 Bound to Divide & Lauren L'aimant - When The Sun Goes Down [Monstercat Silk]
21 4 Strings & Jessie Lee Thetford - Wake Up [Carlo Resoort Records]
22 Tritonal with Marlhy - Back To My Love  (Falden  Remix) [Enhanced]
23 Ciaran McAuley presents ELÏ - Thank You [Flashover Progressive]
24 The Pressure - The Chills [AFTR:HRS]
25 CloudNone & Tadeusz - Come Home [Enhanced]
26 Kryder - Piece Of Art (Crusy  Remix) [Armada Music]
27 Jardin - Falling Apart [Avanti]
